snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: She Gets A SURPRISE! 😱
snippet.description:
Welcome to King’s Guard Tours, a channel dedicated to royal traditions, ceremonial events and British pageantry 🇬🇧

We bring you immersive and engaging videos of the Changing of the Guard, Household Cavalry events at Horse Guards, and major Royal Family events 👑

Our videos often feature the King and Queen, the Prince and Princess of Wales (Prince William and Catherine), and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Edward, Duchess Sophie, and Princess Anne.

Wherever you are in the world, you are very welcome here. If you enjoy royal traditions, history, and behind the scenes glimpses of these iconic events, make sure to subscribe to King’s Guard Tours 🇬🇧

🔔 Subscribe here: https://m.youtube.com/@KingsGuardTours

⭐ Consider becoming a channel member to support the channel: https://m.youtube.com/@KingsGuardTours/join

King’s Guard Tours is an independent channel and is not affiliated with the British Army, Household Division, Ministry of Defence, or the Royal Household.

© Copyright Notice
All content on King’s Guard Tours, including videos, images and graphics, is protected by copyright law. Unauthorised use, copying, distribution, or reuse is strictly prohibited.

📩 Business and media enquiries: Hello@KingsGuardTours.com

snippet.title: Child Asks Deputy Why He Doesn’t Have Doughnuts #shorts
snippet.description: A sheriff’s deputy shared a snack with a temporarily lost child, but the child was surprised with the offering of strawberries and chocolate hummus. “Why don't you have doughnuts?” asked the curious child. The question elicited laughter from the deputy.
